name: Fernand Braudel
bio: Fernand Paul Achille Braudel was a French historian. His scholarship focused on three main projects: The Mediterranean, Civilization and Capitalism (1955–79), and the unfinished Identity of France (1970–85). He was a member of the Annales School of French historiography and social history in the 1950s and 1960s.

awards.name: Commander of the Legion of Honour
honorary doctor of the University of Madrid Complutense
Commander of the French Order of Academic Palms
